name: delayt-monorepo
description: Delayt: API latency testing with percentile analysis

scripts.build:all: npm run build:shared && npm run build:cli && npm run build:app
scripts.build:cli: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace=packages/cli
scripts.test:cli: npm run build:cli && node packages/cli/dist/index.js run -u https://httpbin.org/delay/0.1 -n 3 -q
scripts.publish:shared: npm run build:shared && npm publish --workspace=packages/shared --access public
scripts.publish:cli: npm run build:cli && npm publish --workspace=packages/cli --access public
scripts.test:shared: npm run build:shared && npm run test --workspace=packages/shared
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:shared && npm run typecheck:cli && npm run typecheck:app
scripts.typecheck:cli: npm install --workspace=packages/cli --no-save file:../shared && npx tsc --noEmit --project packages/cli/tsconfig.json

author: devleo10
